'''harungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiko|jiko]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiko|jiko]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| harungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæringith|hæringith]] || [[word:hæringij|hæringij]] || [[word:hæringish|hæringish]] || [[word:hæringi|hæringi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:harurunguth|harurunguth]] || [[word:harurunguj|harurunguj]] || [[word:harurungush|harurungush]] || [[word:harurungu|harurungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:harunguth|harunguth]] || [[word:harunguj|harunguj]] || [[word:harungush|harungush]] || [[word:harungu|harungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:harufnguth|harufnguth]] || [[word:harufnguj|harufnguj]] || [[word:harufngush|harufngush]] || [[word:harufnguf|harufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:harunguthu|harunguthu]] || [[word:harunguju|harunguju]] || [[word:harungushu|harungushu]] || [[word:harunguku|harunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:harunguth|harunguth]] || [[word:harunguj|harunguj]] || [[word:harungush|harungush]] || [[word:harungu|harungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:harunguthul|harunguthul]] || [[word:harungujul|harungujul]] || [[word:harungushul|harungushul]] || [[word:harungukul|harungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:harunguthuthu|harunguthuthu]] || [[word:harungujuju|harungujuju]] || [[word:harungushushu|harungushushu]] || [[word:harunguku|harunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:harunguthun|harunguthun]] || [[word:harungujun|harungujun]] || [[word:harungushun|harungushun]] || [[word:harungukun|harungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:harunguthuoro|harunguthuoro]] || [[word:harungujuoro|harungujuoro]] || [[word:harungushuoro|harungushuoro]] || [[word:harungukuoro|harungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
